Under the leadership of our CEO, Vincent Chong, ST Engineering's growth over the past few years has been driven by our deliberate structural pivot and disciplined execution. The Group transformed from a collection of strong businesses into a more integrated, technology-led, and customer-centric organisation of three distinct segments—Commercial Aerospace, Defence & Public Security, and Smart City—each contributing to sustainable growth, innovation, resilience and scale across the Group. 

Our record order book provides clear revenue visibility for the years ahead. In The Business Times article by Stanislaus Jude Chan, Vincent shares how ST Engineering is ready for its next phase of growth and why the best is yet to come.  

🔗 https://lnkd.in/gd-xmC5D

#STEngineering #Technology #Innovation

Our strength has always been our people. Across ST Engineering, they bring pride, skill and strong sense of responsibility to everything they do, transforming complex challenges across the aerospace, defence and smart city sectors into real-world solutions.

While we are diverse in what we do, we are united by a shared purpose and the strong One ST Engineering spirit that connects us. This collective commitment drives our progress and shapes the impact that we make. 🤝

To everyone who has been part of our journey and continues to be, we wish you a Happy Labour Day and thank you for all that you do! 🎉

#STEngineering #LabourDay #Innovation #OurPeople

company_updates.reshared_post_description:
Earlier today, Head of Naval Engineering and Logistics (HNEL) ME7 Khoo Koh Giok officiated the Steel Cutting Ceremony for our third and fourth Multi-Role Combat Vessels (MRCVs). The ceremony was attended by senior officials and representatives from the RSN and DSTA at ST Engineering Marine Ltd.

MRCV Victory, the first of class, was launched in October 2025, and we look forward to the launch of MRCV #2  in the second half of this year.

The MRCV is designed to function as a “mothership” for unmanned aerial, surface and underwater systems for the conduct of naval operations.

📷: CPL Russell Yim (NIC)

#SingaporeNavy #MRCV #Unmanned

We’re proud to have supported the Singapore Armed Forces in bringing Singaporeans back home ✈️ from the Middle East.

company_updates.reshared_post_description:
This morning, The Republic of Singapore Air Force A330 Multi-Role Tanker Transport (MRTT) deployed to bring Singaporeans back from Jeddah, Saudi Arabia arrived in Singapore at 5:59 am. 

There were 81 Singaporeans and their dependents who returned via the MRTT. After prioritising Singaporeans who registered, available seats were extended to nationals from Australia, Brunei, Indonesia, Philippines, Sri Lanka and Vietnam. 
This is in the spirit of solidarity, just as how other countries have assisted Singaporeans in returning home in past crises.

Over the two deployments, the SAF has supported the return of 299 Singaporeans and their dependents from the Middle East. #bringthemhome

🔗: go.gov.sg/mindef-nr130326

company_updates.reshared_post_description:
TransCore is proud to support the South Jersey Transportation Authority  (SJTA) in completing the transition to all-electronic tolling along the Atlantic City Expressway, marking a major milestone in New Jersey’s tolling modernization efforts.

This achievement reflects SJTA’s leadership and commitment to delivering a safer, more efficient experience for motorists along one of the state’s most heavily traveled corridors. The 44-mile expressway is now operating as New Jersey’s longest continuous open-road tolling system, enabling fully cashless, uninterrupted travel between the Philadelphia region and the Jersey Shore.

As system integrator, TransCore partnered closely with SJTA to design and deliver the all-overhead tolling environment, deploying Infinity® VCATS™, our AI-powered vehicle capture and classification system designed to support accurate, high-speed all-electronic tolling without in-road sensors.

“This project reflects SJTA’s commitment to delivering a safer, more efficient experience for motorists while modernizing infrastructure in a way that is practical and sustainable,” said Whitt Hall, President and CEO of TransCore. “Converting a live tolling corridor of this length to an all-electronic tolling system requires careful planning and execution, and the Atlantic City Expressway marks an important step forward in New Jersey’s tolling modernization efforts.”

This milestone was made possible through strong collaboration between SJTA and TransCore teams working together to meet an ambitious implementation schedule and ensure a smooth transition to all-electronic tolling as 2026 began.

Our #Satcom business, ST Engineering iDirect, is part of the consortium supporting Airbus UpNext's Space Radio Access Network (SpaceRAN) demonstrator that will test global 5G connectivity in orbit.

Developed as part of the Air!5G project supported by the French government, Airbus UpNext SpaceRAN will be key to preparing for 6G connectivity and lowering the cost of orbital data transmission.

We are proud to contribute this project to enable secure, cost-effective and universal 5G connectivity.

NEWS: ST Engineering iDirect has been selected by Airbus UpNext to bring the groundbreaking SpaceRAN demonstrator to life, exploring advanced 5G Non-Terrestrial Network (NTN) capabilities to enable standardized, global connectivity across multiple sectors. 
 
Through this collaboration, ST Engineering iDirect will provide the 5G NTN user equipment (UE), establishing a critical test and validation environment for our ongoing Hybrid #5G NTN UE development. 
 
Together with Airbus and our fellow consortium members, we are paving the way for the next generation of wireless technology, including 6G, and making universal connectivity a reality: https://bit.ly/49CN8Zq

#STEngineering #AirbusUpNext
